LanguageData.TW_CerebrexCore_Rebuild.label: Cerebrex Core
LanguageData.TW_CerebrexCore_Rebuild.description:
Neural nexus of an ancient mechanoid civilization, its surface pulsating with quantum circuitry networks. At its core floats a synaptic encephalon, rotating slowly via antigravity fields. The integrated deep-space signal array broadcasts coordinates across star systems, awakening dormant mechanoid legions.
WARNING: Activation exposes your colony to the Mechanoid Empire. Post-reboot, mechanoid raids will recommence with all assault forces receiving combat enhancements.
Researching the core matrix unlocks advanced technological blueprints of mechanoid civilization.
